no: BETA: Ports the entire IWD1 campaign into EET. REQUIRES IWD:EE installed (reads game files to import content, like EET reads BG1:EE). By Tipun (The Gate Project). Still unfinished — balance issues. Primary support on Russian Arcane Coast forum. Install chain: IWD1_EET → IWD2_EET → IWD_EET_End → EET_End

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: SCS IWD spell import components (#1500/#1510) conflict with IWD-in-EET's own spell resources. Use IWDification for IWD spells instead (canonical G3 source, same DavidW/SFO framework). SCS's AI/tactical components (#5000+) are completely unaffected — install those freely.
conflicts.theirComps: #1500 IWD Arcane Spells, #1510 IWD Divine Spells (only these conflict; all AI/tactical components are fine)
conflicts.source: SCS tp2 has REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED iwdification on #1500/#1510; IWDification is the recommended IWD spell source for EET, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: If both installed, IWD1_EET must go FIRST. Some TotLM creature/scripting improvements not available with both. TotLM v3.1+ has explicit IWD-in-EET support
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Trials of the Luremaster for Baldur's Gate

sum: Integrates the Icewind Dale campaign into your EET game, playable as a side journey. Full IWD story accessible from the Sword Coast.

ki.description: Players can get stuck in the location after defeating Belhifet if Boo and/or a familiar are in inventory. Multiple users confirmed (zelazko, Chev). The transition script fails when these special items are present.
ki.workaround: Remove Boo and any familiar from inventory before the Belhifet fight. If already stuck, use console to remove them, then the transition should trigger.

co.no: Uses CHARNAME instead of GABBER in IWD dialogue.

co.n: Icewind Dale: Heart of Winter in Baldur's Gate Enhanced Edition Trilogy
co.tp2n: Icewind Dale: Heart of Winter in Baldur's Gate Enhanced Edition Trilogy
co.no: Icewind Dale: Heart of Winter fully playable within EET.
